raw: (617) 723-2500 This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum's Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. You do not need to call ahead to reserve a timed ticket. If you have questions or prefer to reserve in advance, you can call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily). Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: Children under 3 are ... always admitted for free
